overall.description: A slow first-person walk through a flooded cyberpunk city street at night during heavy rain. The scene features police tape cordoning off a crime scene with a body in the water, crashed vehicles, and neon-lit futuristic architecture, rendered in high-quality game engine graphics.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded urban crime scene under overpass

agents.ego_description: slowly wading through knee-deep flood water toward a police cordon and crashed vehicle

notable_agents.action: deceased person lying face-down in the flood water near trash bags

entered.detail: glowing yellow police line tape with black chevrons stretched across the street
body in light-colored clothing lying prone in the shallow water
dark damaged vehicle partially submerged under the concrete overpass
white steam rising from a vent or grate on the left sidewalk
staircase with metal railings leading up to an elevated walkway
large illuminated advertisement screen on the building facade above the overpass
garbage bags and scattered debris floating in the water near the curb

segments.scene_description: The camera moves slowly through a flooded cyberpunk street at night, passing under glowing yellow police tape toward a crashed vehicle. A deceased person lies in the water to the left near rising steam, while neon billboards illuminate the rain-soaked scene. The environment features concrete architecture, metal staircases, and scattered debris floating in the knee-deep water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow first-person progression through a rain-drenched cyberpunk street that moves from a restricted crime scene toward the wreckage of a vehicle. It begins by gliding under glowing yellow police tape, where the dim light reveals a deceased person lying in the knee-deep water beside rising plumes of steam. As the camera advances, the surrounding concrete architecture and metal staircases are illuminated by the flickering glow of neon billboards reflecting off the flooded pavement. The scene then shifts focus toward scattered debris floating in the current before finally approaching a crashed vehicle stalled in the middle of the street.
